title: Measurement of GRI porosity for shale sample
steps: Preheat 250g shale sample a vacuum oven at 100 °C for 12-16 hours to remove pore fluids, such as water and oil.
Measure the weight and bulk volume of the shale sample.
Calculate the bulk density ρ b of the shale sample.
Crush the shale sample into 80-200 mesh.
Measure the weight and grain volume of the shale sample.
Calculate the grain density ρ g of the shale sample.
Calculate The GRI porosity Ф GRI of the sample using the following formula: Ф GRI = ( ρ g - ρ b )/ ρ g ×100%.
creator: Shuangfang Lu
